decoder_heading: MyICON Privacy Policy
ident_heading: MyICON Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: MyICON is a mobile software owned by Ai Bei Ji Xing (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd. (Address: 1256, Building 1, No.7, Shi Xing Da Jie, Shijingshan District, Beijing). Before using MyICON, users should read the privacy policy carefully, and your continued use means that you have read and agreed to the various contents of this privacy policy. This clause details the user information obtained by the application and its use, so that users can understand the security and reliability of the user data collection, transmission and use process.

decoder_heading: I. General rules
ident_heading: I. General rules
heading_content_part: I. General rules

decoder_heading: I. General rules
ident_heading: I. General rules
heading_content_part: MyICON attaches great importance to the protection of users' personal information. When you use our application, we may collect and use your relevant information. We hope to explain to you the relevant matters such as our corresponding processing rules when collecting and using your personal information through the "MyICON Privacy Policy" (hereinafter referred to as "this policy"), so as to better protect your rights and interests. Please read this "Privacy Policy" carefully before using the service. If you further use MyICON, you understand and accept all the content stated in this "Privacy Policy" and agree to be bound by it. If you do not accept any of the foregoing, please stop visiting or using MyICON.

heading_content_part: The permissions included in MyICON and their corresponding functions: Get the photo album to obtain storage permissions (WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE, READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE), which is used to store wallpapers to users' devices. The above permissions are applied when you use the relevant functions. If you do not use the relevant functions, we will not apply for the above permissions. You can decide whether to allow MyICON to obtain the above permissions. If you deny us the sensitive permissions that we need to obtain functions, we may not be able to continue to provide you with corresponding services, and we will no longer process your corresponding information.

ident_heading: 2. Sharing with business partners for the realization of specific functions:
heading_content_part: 2. Sharing with business partners for the realization of specific functions: In order to ensure the realization of functions and the safe and stable operation of the application, we may access software development kits (SDKs) provided by third parties. We will conduct strict security monitoring on the SDKs to protect data security. The relevant third-party SDKs we access are listed in this privacy policy. Please note that the third-party SDKs may change their data processing types due to their version upgrades, policy adjustments, etc., please refer to the official instructions published by them. When the application starts, it will obtain location permission (ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION), phone status permission (READ_PHONE_STATE), read external memory card permission (READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE), read phone status and identity (READ_PHONE_STATE), write external memory card (WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE), view WLAN connection (ACCESS_WIFI_STATE) and related device information (such as hardware model, operating system version, IMEI, network device hardware address MAC), and share it with Applovin SDK, Admob SDK, Facebook ads SDK, Pangle SDK, Vungle SDK, Unity ads SDK, Umeng SDK and Tencent Bugly SDK in order to ensure the normal operation of the above SDK.
